base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_draculas_heart — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Dracula's Heart — quest body-part #2. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
